trigger: 8-hour mutual optimization session — analyze remote cc-infra configuration and proxy code for bugs, inconsistencies, and optimization opportunities

analysis_performed.analysis_1: Deep proxy.py code review: found 15+ bugs including unhandled streaming errors, missing message_delta/message_start on broken streams, nested function scope bug (nonlocal), byte-by-byte streaming, missing thinking signature, duplicate _log_lock, malformed JSON chunks silently skipped
analysis_performed.analysis_2: LiteLLM config comparison: KEY5 discrepancy (glm51 had 7 keys/77 deployments, dsv4p had 6 keys/66 deployments), missing AuthenticationErrorAllowedFails in glm51, duplicate AuthenticationErrorAllowedFails in dsv4p, missing store_prompts_in_spend_logs in glm51, stale header comments
analysis_performed.analysis_3: Docker-compose review: MS_KEY5 env var was duplicate of MS_KEY1, proxy healthcheck used GET instead of HEAD, MODEL_INPUT_TOKEN_SAFETY_GLM51 was 190000 (exceeded model capacity)
analysis_performed.analysis_4: Proxy error conversion: _convert_error could map 401 to authentication_error which freezes Claude Code — added safety to never map to auth_error
analysis_performed.analysis_5: Health check script review: uses /health endpoint on LiteLLM containers which triggers deployment freeze (ROOT CAUSE of 401 freeze chain)
analysis_performed.analysis_6: opc_uname r2 analysis review: confirmed GLM-5.1 context window is 128K (131072), not 190K

fixes_applied.fix_1: KEY5 removed from glm51 config: 77→66 deployments (11 variants × 6 keys). KEY5 was duplicate of KEY1 (same value ms-bb4e5bee), not the revoked ms-f7231d97. 11 redundant deployments consuming KEY1 quota twice
fixes_applied.fix_2: MS_KEY5 env var removed from docker-compose.yml for both services, replaced with revocation comment
fixes_applied.fix_3: AuthenticationErrorAllowedFails: 0 added to glm51 config (was missing — caused 401 freeze risk since KEY5 was still present)
fixes_applied.fix_4: Duplicate AuthenticationErrorAllowedFails line removed from dsv4p config
fixes_applied.fix_5: store_prompts_in_spend_logs: true added to glm51 config (parity with dsv4p)
fixes_applied.fix_6: glm51 deployment timeout: 180→300 (match dsv4p, allow retries within request_timeout=300 window)
fixes_applied.fix_7: cooldown_time: 120→60 in both configs (reduce capacity loss during cooldown at 66 RPM pool)
fixes_applied.fix_8: lowest_latency_buffer: 0.3→0.1 in both configs (tighter latency routing at rpm=1)
fixes_applied.fix_9: RateLimitErrorAllowedFails: 3→1 in both configs (rpm=1 means rate limit is definitive quota exhaustion)
fixes_applied.fix_10: Proxy streaming: wrapped streaming loop in try/except — catches RemoteDisconnected/timeout/OSError/ConnectionResetError/IncompleteRead. Emits graceful close (content_block_stop + message_delta + message_stop)
fixes_applied.fix_11: Proxy streaming: added _emit_graceful_end() helper that always emits message_delta + message_stop on stream end
fixes_applied.fix_12: Proxy streaming: added nonlocal declarations for message_start_sent, message_delta_sent, active_block_type — without these, nested helper functions created new local variables instead of modifying outer scope
fixes_applied.fix_13: Proxy streaming: added message_delta_sent tracking to avoid duplicate message_delta events
fixes_applied.fix_14: Proxy streaming: thinking content_block_start now includes signature field
fixes_applied.fix_15: Proxy streaming: changed resp.read(1) to resp.read(8192) for ~8000x throughput improvement
fixes_applied.fix_16: Proxy streaming: malformed JSON chunks now logged as WARN instead of silently skipped
fixes_applied.fix_17: Proxy: duplicate _log_lock definition removed (line 102 and 106 were both threading.Lock())
fixes_applied.fix_18: Proxy: incorporated opc_uname's SSE event_type fix: `if event_type and event_type != "chunk"` — LiteLLM sends data without event: line
fixes_applied.fix_19: Proxy: _convert_error now intentionally never maps 401 to authentication_error — CC freezes on auth errors, resilience retry handles 401s first
fixes_applied.fix_21: MODEL_MAX_INPUT_TOKENS glm5.1: 202745→131072 (actual capacity confirmed by ZhipuAI docs)
fixes_applied.fix_23: health_check.sh: changed LiteLLM health check from /health to /health/liveliness (prevents deployment freeze)
fixes_applied.fix_24: docker-compose proxy healthcheck: changed from GET /health to HEAD /health (lighter weight)
fixes_applied.fix_25: CLAUDE.md adjustable params table updated with current values

documentation_sources.key5_duplicate: docker-compose.yml: MS_KEY5=ms-bb4e5bee (same as MS_KEY1, not the revoked ms-f7231d97)
documentation_sources.glm51_capacity: opc_uname r2 analysis: GLM-5.1 context window is 128K (131072 tokens) per ZhipuAI docs
documentation_sources.health_endpoint_freeze: DEPLOY_STATUS.md: /health triggers on-demand health check → choices=null → ALL deployments marked unhealthy
documentation_sources.401_freeze_chain: DEPLOY_STATUS.md: Root Cause: 401 Freeze Chain — enable_pre_call_checks → health check → unhealthy → KEY5 401 → no healthy deployments → CC stops

expected_outcomes.outcome_1: 11 fewer KEY5 401 errors per request cycle — KEY5 deployments removed, no more auth errors on glm51
expected_outcomes.outcome_2: Faster recovery from rate-limit/timeout errors — cooldown_time reduced from 120→60s
expected_outcomes.outcome_3: Better latency routing — lowest_latency_buffer 0.3→0.1 reduces wasted latency at rpm=1
expected_outcomes.outcome_4: Fewer wasted requests on rate-limited deployments — RateLimitErrorAllowedFails 3→1
expected_outcomes.outcome_5: No more streaming connection crashes — exceptions caught and handled gracefully
expected_outcomes.outcome_6: No more missing message_stop/message_delta on broken streams — CC always receives complete Anthropic protocol events
expected_outcomes.outcome_7: Better streaming throughput — 8192 byte reads vs 1 byte reads
expected_outcomes.outcome_8: No input token safety exceeding model capacity — 120000 limit on 131072 model
expected_outcomes.outcome_9: Faster proxy container rebuild — python:3.11-alpine vs 1.68GB litellm image
expected_outcomes.outcome_10: No deployment freeze from health check scripts — /health/liveliness used instead of /health

optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_1: Monitor 401 error rate after KEY5 removal — should drop to zero on glm51
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_2: Monitor cooldown recovery time — compare before/after error rates at cooldown_time=60
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_3: Monitor latency distribution with lowest_latency_buffer=0.1 — should see tighter latency spread
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_4: Verify proxy streaming error handling in production — check for graceful close events in logs
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_5: Monitor if python:3.11-alpine proxy container works correctly (no stdlib version issues)
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_6: Verify /health/liveliness endpoint works on LiteLLM containers for monitoring
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_7: Compare proxy rebuild time before/after (litellm image vs alpine)
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_8: Check if MODEL_MAX_INPUT_TOKENS=131072 is correct for /v1/models endpoint response
